@[37rem]:[--thread-content-margin:--spacing(6)] @[72rem]:[--thread-content-margin:--spacing(16)] px-(--thread-content-margin)"><div class="[--thread-content-max-width:32rem] @[34rem]:[--thread-content-max-width:40rem] @[64rem]:[--thread-content-max-width:48rem] mx-auto max-w-(--thread-content-max-width) flex-1 group/turn-messages focus-visible:outline-hidden relative flex flex-col gap-1 empty:hidden first:pt-[3px]"><div class="markdown prose dark:prose-invert w-full break-words dark markdown-new-styling"><p data-start="0" data-end="100">Perfect — next up is building the ⭐ <strong data-start="36" data-end="65">review submission feature</strong> for readers in the <code data-start="85" data-end="95">"reader"</code> tab.</p>
<p data-start="102" data-end="119">This module will:</p>
<ul data-start="120" data-end="251">
<li data-start="120" data-end="160">
<p data-start="122" data-end="160">Let readers rate each book (1–5 stars)</p>
</li>
<li data-start="161" data-end="183">
<p data-start="163" data-end="183">Leave a short review</p>
</li>
<li data-start="184" data-end="251">
<p data-start="186" data-end="251">Auto-display their review under each book entry (locally for now)</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="253" data-end="358">I’ll now add this review system beneath each “Read Now” button using controlled components and mock data.</p>
<p data-start="360" data-end="384" data-is-last-node="" data-is-only-node="">🛠 Updating live canvas…</p></div></div></div><div class="flex flex-col gap-2"><button class="text-token-text-secondary flex min-h-5 w-fit flex-row items-center gap-1.5 pt-[3px] text-start select-none hover:text-token-text-primary">Edited Chapterhouse Marketing Demo</button></div><div data-message-author-role="assistant" data-message-id="93aae4e7-3f05-4882-b9ea-e40389360fc4" dir="auto" class="min-h-8 text-message relative flex w-full flex-col items-end gap-2 text-start break-words whitespace-normal [.text-message+&amp;]:mt-5" data-message-model-slug="gpt-4o"><div class="flex w-full flex-col gap-1 empty:hidden first:pt-[3px]"><div class="markdown prose dark:prose-invert w-full break-words dark markdown-new-styling"><p data-start="0" data-end="53">✅ Reader reviews are now live in the <code data-start="37" data-end="52">"Reader View"</code>:</p>
<ul data-start="55" data-end="164">
<li data-start="55" data-end="84">
<p data-start="57" data-end="84">⭐ Click-to-rate (1–5 stars)</p>
</li>
<li data-start="85" data-end="115">
<p data-start="87" data-end="115">💬 Leave a short text review</p>
</li>
<li data-start="116" data-end="164">
<p data-start="118" data-end="164">📚 Reviews display beneath each book instantly</p>
</li>
</ul>

</li>

<h3 data-start="114" data-end="159">✅ SBS Recap: Admin Dashboard Enhancements</h3>
<h4 data-start="161" data-end="189">1. <strong data-start="169" data-end="189">🎨 Brand Styling</strong></h4>
<ul data-start="190" data-end="375">
<li data-start="190" data-end="375">
<p data-start="192" data-end="266">Charts and buttons styled using Freeman Fields Chapterhouse color palette:</p>
<ul data-start="269" data-end="375">
<li data-start="269" data-end="325">
<p data-start="271" data-end="325">Slate and grayscale tones (<code data-start="298" data-end="307">#4B5563</code>, <code data-start="309" data-end="318">#6B7280</code>, etc.)</p>
</li>
<li data-start="328" data-end="375">
<p data-start="330" data-end="375">Uniform padding, font sizing, and card layout</p>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
<h4 data-start="377" data-end="407">2. <strong data-start="385" data-end="407">🔎 Filter Controls</strong></h4>
<ul data-start="408" data-end="534">
<li data-start="408" data-end="534">
<p data-start="410" data-end="454">Ready to add dropdowns or filter buttons by:</p>
<ul data-start="457" data-end="534">
<li data-start="457" data-end="472">
<p data-start="459" data-end="472">📚 Book Title</p>
</li>
<li data-start="475" data-end="534">
<p data-start="477" data-end="534">🏷 Genre (next step requires assigning genres to reviews)</p>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
<h4 data-start="536" data-end="563">3. <strong data-start="544" data-end="563">🖼 Chart Export</strong></h4>
<ul data-start="564" data-end="718">
<li data-start="564" data-end="665">
<p data-start="566" data-end="605">Added <code data-start="572" data-end="590">📤 Export as PNG</code> buttons below:</p>
<ul data-start="608" data-end="665">
<li data-start="608" data-end="634">
<p data-start="610" data-end="634">Bar chart (Review Count)</p>
</li>
<li data-start="637" data-end="665">
<p data-start="639" data-end="665">Line chart (Signup Growth)</p>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li data-start="666" data-end="718">
<p data-start="668" data-end="718">Uses canvas capture for browser-only functionality</p>
</li>
</ul>

<ul data-start="754" data-end="884">

<p data-start="916" data-end="946">📦 <strong data-start="919" data-end="946">Drop full export build?</strong></p>
